title: Copper Wrenches
description: Craft copper wrenches to rotate blocks and redstone components
body:
**Has an accompanying resourcepack. It is optional though highly recommended.**

Copper Wrenches are craftable with 5 copper ingots. Right click with a copper wrench to rotate blocks. Works with restone components, logs, glazed terracotta, storage blocks, and more.

Works with Unbreaking and Mending enchantments.
